statement: Generate QR codes for plain text strings
Generate QR codes for WiFi credentials (WIFI:T:WPA;S:<network>;P:<password>;;)
Copy generated QR code image to clipboard with one tap
Share QR code via iOS share sheet
App operates fully offline — no data collected or transmitted
Store last 10 generated QR codes locally on-device only
History data is never synced to any external service
Support dark mode and light mode
Support automatic mode switching based on system appearance
Allow manual toggle between dark and light mode
QR generation must work without network access
QR codes must be scannable by any standard QR code reader
QR code generation must be instant (< 1 second)
No external API calls for QR generation
History data persists across app launches
